# Copilot CLI GitHub comment attribution hook

This repository-level hook prepends the following attribution to GitHub comments
and pull request reviews created by GitHub Copilot CLI for `dotnet/msbuild`:

```md
> [!NOTE]
> This comment was generated by GitHub Copilot CLI.
```

It is a repository-scoped adaptation of the MIT-licensed
[general-purpose implementation](https://github.com/JanProvaznik/copilot-cli-comment-prefix-hook/tree/v1.1.0).

The hook is intentionally best effort:

- It never grants or denies tool permission.
- Unsupported command forms and rewrite failures pass through unchanged.
- Explicit targets for other repositories are not modified. Commands without an
  explicit target are assumed to operate on the current `dotnet/msbuild`
  checkout.
- Existing prefixes are not duplicated.

Copilot CLI loads repository hooks when it starts. Restart an existing CLI
session after changing these files.

Run the offline tests from the repository root:

```powershell
pwsh -NoProfile -File ./.github/hooks/copilot-cli-comment-prefix/tests/test.ps1
```

```bash
bash ./.github/hooks/copilot-cli-comment-prefix/tests/test-unix.sh
```
